parameters: This is my old man's room.
Please select the memory/fantasy you wish to replay.
The free attendence days end from today, and the summer vacation begins.
...Gotta make sure there's nothing left for me to regret in this period.
Would you like to skip until the route divergence point?
From here on out, you will control the protagonist
for a period of 10 days from 07/15, with 5 turns (Morning, Noon, Evening, Night, Late Night)
in each day, for 50 turns total.
Your goal will be to collect flags for each route during those 50 turns.
If you do not manage to raise any flags, it will result in a BAD END.
Aside from just events, you can also spend turns by skipping
time using your phone in any place aside from the world map.
The same can also be done by clicking the time slot icon on
the top left. Please use whicever.
It's possible to jump to the world map at any time with
just a single button press from any and every map as well.
There is a toggleable NTR Flag Guide option in the configuration
menu. Please turn it on (default) if you wish to know the locations of the other men,
or turn it off if you wish to clear the game without those hints.
1) RIME -> Chat with a character (with unread functionality)
4) Photo gallery (view the photos collected so far, etc)
the smartphone can also be used for these features.
The above features are not essential to progress the game, so
please enjoy them as a sort of bonus elements.
This information can be accessed again at any time using the bookshelf in your room.

Would you like to view the user guide? (Can be viewed at any time from your room's 
bookshelf)
フキダシアイコンの消去
フキダシアイコンの消去
対象キャラ-名前 = 全
Whose nude body would you like to imagine?
...I've never seen Shino like that so I can't really imagine it.
...I haven't really gotten a good look at her like that.
You're really something, aren't you? Right from the first day of free attendance too.
\sa[126]\SE[28]Jeez, I've got stuff to take care of at school so
\SE[19]I'll make you pay me back for this with some sweets one of these days--!
Well then, I'm heading out, okay? Don't come to me if you spend half the day sleeping~
スライドスピード = def
...She did come to wake me up, so I guess I'll head out myself as well.
Depending upon the turn, there might be times when you'll have no events to use up
time. Please use the time skip feature whenever you're done exploring.
...A whole lot of time passed while I was reading manga.
I wondered whether I should go to sleep or not, and my body told me no.
Maybe I'll kill some time on RIME with Shino.
She's more of a night owl than I am or ever was, so she almost
never goes to sleep before I do.
Let's just chat with her for a bit.
I took out my phone, and sent a message on RIME to Shino.
I waited a while, but no reply came.
Is she sleeping? It might be bad manners but,
I guess I'll try listening in against the wall.
It's of course impossible to tell exactly what she's doing, but
I can tell whether she's awake or not from her general presence.
She seems to do it herself from time to time, to check if I've gotten up in the morning,
so surely she won't condemn me for doing the same to her.
I can faintly hear the sound of her talking. Seems like she's awake after all.
Is she playing a game or something? Since I can hear her talking, could she
be playing that online game everyone's been talking about while on voice chat?
I can tell that she's enjoying herself.
The faint "chan" made me feel relieved.
Phew... so it's just a female friend of hers, huh?
Maybe I should have tried that game out too, when she sent me an invite.
I guess she needs some me-time too.
While thinking that, I forced myself to go to sleep.
Would you like to view [Shino's viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)

(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)
Yet again I found myself bored without anything to do before bed,
so I decided to hit up Shino on RIME instead.
Of course, I didn't expect a reply. She's probably busy with her games,
so it'd be too much to expect her to read it.
I tried sensing her presence through the wall... and failed to detect anything.
A broken string of messages. Was she just about to fall asleep?
Damn, I shouldn't have done that. Now she's going to be wide awake.
Guess I'll just be good for today and go to sleep on time for once.
I decided not to return a reply and headed for bed instead.

"Maybe I should head to bed", I thought to myself. I was in a loop of
constantly opening and closing tweeter, so instead I chose to lay
down in bed to put an end to that waste of time.
I'm not all that sleepy but it's not like I've got much else to do...
I heard a light knock of something, through the wall I shared with the next room over.
She had her bed next to the wall too, so sometimes I'd hear random
noises in the silence of the night.
...Did she turn over in her sleep, or something?
The fact that I could hear the sounds from the spot I was in
meant that she herself was also likely in bed as well.
I wondered for a bit whether she'd respond if I sent her a message right now,
before giving up on the idea. I'd hate to wake her up if she's actually asleep.
After pondering over it, I decided to just go to sleep instead.
The actual reason was the sudden wave of sleepiness I felt though.
...I guess I'll ask her tomorrow instead, what she was doing at night.
I gave in to the drowsiness... closed my eyes... and let my mind drift into the...
